# Baseline angle

# Transcript
*A EPIKRANA TWN KIONWN TWN EIS TO PROSTWIO
TO ELEYSINI TETTARAKAIDEKA AGAGEIN PE
TELHQEN ELEYSINADE TRIA WS AN PARAL
ARA TOY LIQOTOMOY KATA LIQON THN M
POIOYMENOS MEGEQOS TN LIQWN TW
KA MHKOS KAI PLATOS ANWQEN KAT
N EPTA PODWN PALASTHS DEONTW
KATWQEN DE KATA TON AYCENA S*
A THN DIAMETRON PENTE PODW
TYLOIN YUOS TRIWN PODWN D
DEONTWN TA DE GWNIAIA DY
TOIS ALLOIS TO DE PLATO
I ANWQEN KAI KATWQ**
IZW TWN DWDEKA KA*
ERON OPO AN KEL
DE SYNECWS EAN 
*OI KOMIZW
RWTOYS PAR
AI TOYS DE*
TOMOI EP*
OTTOS P
HS DHM
IANI
